demographics.living_situation: lives with a roommate; roommate is present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest feels like it is ripping apart, the pain is shooting straight through to my spine, and I can barely catch my breath.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on suddenly about half an hour ago while I was moving boxes, and now I've got a pounding headache and I feel like I might faint.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 30 minutes ago, very suddenly, while moving boxes
symptom_narrative.character: a tearing, ripping pain that shoots straight through to between my shoulder blades
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever felt
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the middle of my chest, going straight through to my back/spine
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and not letting up since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement seems to make it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm really short of breath, my head is pounding, and I feel faint
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can barely move or catch my breath

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Turner syndrome (I have the 45,X chromosome pattern)
past_medical_history.how_managed: followed by specialists over the years

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: born with a narrowing of my main artery (coarctation of the aorta)
a bicuspid aortic valve (a heart valve with two flaps instead of three)

past_medical_history.how_managed: I take a daily tablet for it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a daily beta-blocker tablet for my blood pressure

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: fully independent; was moving boxes at home when the pain started; roommate is with her

objective_data_offered.value: breathing fast and shallow, looks to be in severe pain and clutching her chest
roommate says she looks very pale and sweaty and keeps saying she feels faint
